UserComments.Comment: The charging station has often malfunctions & charging interrupts,& also E.On company repeatedly performed deceptive behavior with goal to cheat U with pricing.For example their 8hrs.limit counts also for night,even they tell/write U the opposite,it is a trap,also they often charge U day-price(9.5CZK/KWh) also @ night(when they announce 8CZK/KWh),they r always lieing with pricing,be aware & do not forget interrupt charging every 8hrs.to avoid extra fees & do so also during night,they announced,that parking fee free minutes r not being deducted during night,but they R & by believing them 1ce,i was charged extra 745CZK.E.On is a highly deceptive company.

AddressInfo.Title: E.On Public Charging Station(AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AddressLine2: South-west corner of the parking lot.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access.3 reserved parking bays.If not used by ICE cars,U may also use 2 other adjacent parking bays,which i advise to use for AC charging,if U have an extension cable,thus if possible,left the central 3 bays free for DC charging.If U r heading south,U will be unable to return to the main road & turn left to south,U will have to go north & turn back using the next crossing & the adjacent side-street.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8.5CZK for E.On users.

GeneralComments: Nearest restrooms & warm food:restaurant U Medvěda,when closed,no toilet nearby.AC charging is often unstable.
